title: Numbers left: 1-5 at speed
description: Drill left-hand digits — same fingers as Q-W-E-R-T
tips: Numbers row is the FAR stretch — same finger as column letter
Don't look at the number row

character_tips.anna: Numbers row is far. Same finger as the column letter — that's the rule.
character_tips.maxim: Main row digits, not numpad. The latter is a different skill.
character_tips.knopych: 🔢 LEFT DIGITS! 1-5 same fingers as QWERT!
